name: Actinver Casa De Bolsa, S.A. De C.V.
summary: Actinver Casa De Bolsa, S.A. De C.V. provides securities brokerage and dealership services. The company offers stocks, bonds, and derivatives brokerage services. Additionally, it provides currency exchanges and trust services. The firm also offers an initial public offering, private placements, and mergers and acquisitions advisory services.
